positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical composition featuring a majestic bioluminescent fox curled among glowing celestial flora and cosmic roots. The fox has a stylized, clean silhouette with vibrant, ethereal coloring (deep blues, emerald greens, gold accents). Floating nebulae dust and stylized constellations are woven into the background, creating a sense of depth and magic. Use a highly contrasting, gradient wash background (deep indigo transitioning to midnight blue). Art style: Neo-Victorian occult illustration meets psychedelic kawaii, vector line work on a watercolor texture base. Minimalist background elements, perfect central focal point, high contrast, clean edges, designed for apparel print, 8k, crisp details.
negative: artifacts, blur, low quality, amateur drawing, text, signature, watermark, logos, brand names, poor anatomy, noisy, grainy, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, disfigured, ugly, cartoonish, messy background
